title: Building Great Agent Skills: The Missing Manual
summary: Matt from AI Engineer presents guidance on building effective agent skills, framed as a comprehensive manual for agent development. This appears to be the third contribution from the same creator on the topic.
writeup: Matt from AI Engineer walks through how to build effective agent skills, framing the talk as a comprehensive manual for agent development. The video covers agent skills and agent orchestration, two areas central to making agents reliable in practice. It is the creator's third contribution on the topic, building on prior guidance.
